# `!stat`

**Category:** files

Stat a remote path and save the result (exists, is_dir, mode, owner, group) into a host variable for later use. Read-only; never modifies the target.

## Parameters

| Name | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `path` | path | yes | Remote path to inspect. |
| `save` | string | yes | Variable name under which the stat result map is stored. |

## Examples

```yaml
- !stat
  path: /usr/local/bin/app
  save: app_binary
```
